price: O Mensch, was hat dich hinsichtlich deines edelmütigen Herrn getäuscht,
arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلۡكَرِيمِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: yāayyuhā al-insānu mā gharraka birabbika al-karīmi
